About

Who I Am

I'm a Java Full Stack Developer based in Latur, Maharashtra — final year MCA at SRTMU Nanded. I specialize in building end-to-end web applications with Spring Boot, MySQL, Spring Security, and clean HTML/CSS/JS frontends.

Every project I build is production-grade from day one — proper auth, role-based access, database design, REST APIs, and real-world use cases. I've built a commercial College ERP SaaS designed for ₹1L+ per license deployment.

I'm actively looking for Java Backend / Full Stack Developer roles where I can contribute meaningfully from day one — not just write CRUD apps.

Projects

Featured Work

01 · MCA Final Year Project · Solo Built
🏠
Real Estate Property Management System
Problem: Property buyers had no unified platform to browse, save, and inquire about verified listings

A full-featured real estate platform with dual roles — Owners can list, manage and respond to inquiries; Buyers can browse, save and send inquiries. Built solo with Spring Boot REST APIs, Spring Security auth, and Gmail SMTP email notifications.

⚡ Key Challenge Solved
Resolved Jackson circular reference errors in bidirectional JPA relationships, configured Gmail SMTP App Password for email notifications, and fixed foreign key constraint issues during cascade deletes.
Role-based auth — OWNER / BUYER / ADMIN with Spring Security
Property listing with approval workflow — admin verifies before going live
Inquiry system — buyers inquire, owners reply, status tracked (PENDING/REPLIED)
Gmail SMTP email notifications on inquiry and reply
Advanced filtering — city, type, price range, bedrooms, area
Buyer dashboard — saved properties, inquiry history, recently viewed
Spring BootSpring SecurityMySQLBootstrap 5Gmail SMTPJPA/HibernateREST API
GitHub Repository →
02 · Portfolio Project · Solo Built
Employee Management System
Problem: HR teams needed one system for leave, attendance, payroll visibility and reporting

Role-based HR system with ADMIN, HR, and EMPLOYEE dashboards. Spring Security authentication, Chart.js analytics, Excel/PDF export, and profile photo upload — all in one application.

⚡ Key Challenge
Implementing granular role-based access so each role sees only their relevant data and actions.
Spring BootSpring SecurityThymeleafMySQLChart.js
GitHub →
🏫
COMMERCIAL SAAS PRODUCT
Target: ₹1L+ per license
03 · Commercial SaaS · Solo Built
College ERP System
Problem: Small colleges need affordable, complete ERP — not expensive enterprise solutions

Multi-tenant SaaS ERP with per-college data isolation, license key system with kill switch, renewal email reminders, and role dashboards for Principal, Teacher, Student, Librarian, and Accountant.

⚡ Key Challenge
Implementing multi-tenancy with TenantContext + TenantFilter so one database serves multiple colleges with complete isolation.
Spring BootMulti-TenantMySQLJava 17SaaS
